attributes.description: Disk bytes, IOPS, time-based counters, and queue depth to spot storage bottlenecks.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"type":"markdown","embeddableConfig":{"content":"## [System Host OTel] Disk I/O

Block device throughput, operation rates, and latency-related counters from the host metrics pipeline.
- Byte and operation throughput with read and write direction
- Time spent in I/O and per-direction operation time as rates when present
- Pending operation queue depth by device in a table","hide_title":true,"settings":{"open_links_in_new_tab":true}},"panelIndex":"0142130f-a617-466d-b5ca-c6632f96ecf4","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"0142130f-a617-466d-b5ca-c6632f96ecf4"}},{"type":"vis","embeddableConfig":{"title":"b","hide_title":true,"attributes":{"visualizationType":"lnsMetric","title":"","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"layer_0":{"index":"metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*-55f51cdc73d579d425c669028639bac675bba0aa5bf8197de918a678a4beeb88","query":{"esql":"TS metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*
